comment: 35yo male with established hereditary chronic pancreatitis since adolescence — recurrent acute pancreatitis episodes from age 12, parenchymal atrophy + ductal irregularities on MRCP, confirmed germline PRSS1 pathogenic variant (autosomal dominant; father + paternal uncle affected, paternal grandfather died of PDAC age 58). No personal PDAC diagnosis. EUROPAC: lifetime PDAC risk ~40-50% by age 70 in hereditary pancreatitis (vs ~5% in alcoholic chronic pancreatitis). Engine fires RF-CHRONIC-PANCREATITIS-PDAC-PREVENTION → routes to PreventionPlan: CAPS-consortium PDAC surveillance (annual EUS ± MRCP starting age 40 OR 20y after pancreatitis onset, whichever earlier — already eligible at 35), aggressive smoking-cessation (multiplies risk), genetic counseling for first-degree relatives + cascade testing, alcohol minimization, diabetes screening (new-onset DM is paraneoplastic risk-marker). Validates v0.3 hereditary-pancreatitis pilot. Anchored DIS-PDAC.
